title: Student Housing Ano Poli: Perfect 2-Bed Flat

about.summary: Student housing Ano Poli located in the traditional Kleious building. This perfect 2-bedroom flat is ideal for students, Erasmus students, and digital nomads looking for comfortable student accommodation near City Centre Thessaloniki.

sections.title: Student Housing Ano Poli Guide
sections.content: This flat is ideal for students and offers an excellent base for your studies. It features a 2 Bedrooms / 2 Beds configuration, making it perfect for sharing. You will find everything needed for daily life right here.
highlights: Fully equipped: The apartment has the essentials for comfortable student accommodation.
Erasmus housing: Ideal for Erasmus students wanting to experience the historic area.
Flexible stay: Great setup for digital nomads requiring a dedicated workspace.

sections.title: Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: The building is located at the beginning of Ano Poli, just a short walk to City Centre Thessaloniki. Daily errands are easy with shops nearby. You can easily access various city attractions without hassle.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarket, bakery, and cafes are around 50 meters away.
University access: Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance.
Walkable area: The commercial center is a 5-10 minute walk, reducing the need for daily bus use.

sections.title: Bills, Services & Links
sections.content: Maintenance, water, and Wi-Fi are included in the rent. Electricity is paid separately. For more information about exploring the city, check out this Thessaloniki travel guide. We would love to host you in this comfortable apartment. Check out our other Kleious listings if you are looking for different options.

reviews.author: Yusuf Ad
reviews.content: My friend and I stayed here for 6 months for our Erasmus internship and had a great experience. The apartment was clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed. The location was amazing it was close to shops, public transport, the city center, and many historical places. Highly recommended for Erasmus students who want to live in Thessaloniki.

seo.seo_title: Student Housing Ano Poli: Perfect 2-Bed Flat
seo.seo_description: Student housing Ano Poli perfect for Erasmus students. This 2-bedroom flat is near Aristotle University and ideal for digital nomads.
